text:
C = Part A and Part B state buy-in 

COMMENT: This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was entitled to Part A, Part B, or both for a given 
month. There are 12 monthly variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name 
correspond with the month (e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December).The variable also indicates 
whether the beneficiary’s state of residence paid his/her monthly premium for Part B coverage (and 
Part A if necessary). State Medicaid programs can pay
